sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113010" key="xalini=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλῑν-ῖτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113010.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bridling,</tr_> epith. of Athena, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who bridled</tr_> Pegasus for Bellerophon, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:4:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
